error_codes.message: No approved communication edge exists between these agent roles.
error_codes.remediation_hint: Go to Communication → Edges and add an approved connection between these roles, or contact your admin.

error_codes.message: The artifact kind is not permitted on this communication edge.
error_codes.remediation_hint: Use one of the allowed artifact kinds defined for this edge, or update the edge policy.

error_codes.message: The requested intent is not permitted on this communication edge.
error_codes.remediation_hint: Choose an intent from the allowed list for this edge, or update the edge policy.

error_codes.message: A required artifact reference is missing from the consult payload.
error_codes.remediation_hint: Include at least one artifact reference (e.g. ticket_ref, pr_ref) before sending this consult.

error_codes.message: This edge requires a human acknowledgement before the consult can be forwarded.
error_codes.remediation_hint: A human must review and approve this consult in the Approvals dashboard before it proceeds.

error_codes.message: The communication quota for this edge has been exceeded.
error_codes.remediation_hint: Quota resets every hour. Check the Communication dashboard for current usage, or contact admin to adjust limits.

error_codes.message: The specified communication edge does not exist.
error_codes.remediation_hint: Create the edge in the Communication canvas before sending consults.

error_codes.message: The imported template bundle hash does not match the manifest.
error_codes.remediation_hint: The bundle may be corrupted or tampered. Re-download from the official catalog and retry.

error_codes.message: The recipe bundle failed schema validation.
error_codes.remediation_hint: The bundle does not match the expected schema for this version. Contact Conduro support.
